title: Missing From<ParseError> for SieveError
description: In lib.rs compile(), lexer::tokenize and form::read_script errors are manually converted via .map_err(|e| SieveError { message: e.to_string(), kind: SieveErrorKind::Lex }). Implementing From<ParseError> for SieveError (one impl for Lex, one for Parse) would let the ? operator handle the conversion, eliminating the map_err boilerplate and making the error-propagation path idiomatic.
